name: claude-skills
description: Reusable Claude Code skills for session management, plan execution, queue orchestration, and code review pipelines

plugins.name: session-management
plugins.description: Handoff generation, session wrap-up, and structured debug triage. Use when sessions end abnormally (context exhaustion, debug fork, scope creep) or when wrapping up work cleanly.

plugins.name: plan-execution
plugins.description: Phase-by-phase execution of approved markdown plans with parallel sub-agent dispatch and per-phase handoffs.

plugins.name: queue-orchestration
plugins.description: Skills for the cw CLI multi-session work queue: enqueue plans and tech-debt items, then claim and execute them with agent teams.

plugins.name: review-pipeline
plugins.description: Full code review pipeline: parallel specialized reviewer agents, the Linear-to-ship auto-dev flow, and PR review monitoring. Bundles 14 reviewer agents, commands, and posting scripts.
